title: Last column numFmt overrides the format of previous colums
author: alexgarciaalcuadrado

comments.author: chriscappy16
comments.body: I'm having this problem as well.  Seems like a bug somewhere?

comments.author: ChandanChainani
allynsweet
comments.body: I'm encountering this issue as well, super strange, but the last `numFmt` on column or individual cell applies to all cells in the sheet. Anyone find a solution for this?
